Source URL: https://www.score.org/business-education/

# SCORE Workshops, Events, and Business Education Process

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, business-education, workshops, webinars, training

## Resource purpose
SCORE business education page for live webinars, local workshops, and other learning opportunities.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use when the user needs structured learning on a topic, wants a workshop, or needs low-cost/free education before or alongside mentoring.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
All stages. Strong fit for Ideation, Validation, Formation, Launch, Operations, Growth, and Exit.

## Best audience
Entrepreneurs who prefer classes, workshops, webinars, or self-guided education.

## Route the user here when
The user asks for classes, workshops, webinars, training, business basics, or topic-specific learning.

## Useful intake questions before referral
- Do you want a live class, recorded webinar, online course, or mentor session?
- What topic do you need to learn first?
- Do you prefer local Houston events or virtual national events?
- What stage is your business in?

## Key resources or subresources
- Live and upcoming business education: https://www.score.org/business-education/ — Main education search page.
- Recorded webinars: https://www.score.org/business-education/recorded-webinars/ — On-demand webinar library.
- In-person events: https://www.score.org/business-education/in-person/ — Local in-person sessions where available.
- Online courses: https://www.score.org/online-courses/ — Self-guided modules, including free and premium options.
- SCORE Academy: https://academy.score.org/ — SCORE’s online learning platform.

## BOSS routing notes
- Workshop dates, registration links, and local event availability change frequently; always route to the live URL for current details.
- For overwhelmed ideation users, pair one workshop with one mentor referral rather than giving a long list.
- For Houston users, combine national filters with the SCORE Houston chapter page.

## Related SCORE links
- SCORE Houston events: https://www.score.org/tx/houston/
- Recorded webinars: https://www.score.org/business-education/recorded-webinars/
- Online courses: https://www.score.org/online-courses/

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
